preflight_findings.figma_mcp_evidence: mcp__claude_ai_Figma__whoami returned email=regev.ba@gmail.com, plan=pro/Full-seat. mcp__claude_ai_Figma__get_libraries on fsjHfFLAHELACZHku8Rfcl returned 8 libraries-added-to-file (Material 3, Simple Design System, iOS 18+26, iPadOS 26, watchOS 26, visionOS 26, macOS 26, plus 'Regev - Tattoo App Colors' team library).
preflight_findings.figma_library_name: FitMe Story Web — Design System (inferred from cross-doc references)

code_connect_write_access.reason: Pro tier + Full seat does not expose 'Code Connect Write' / 'file_dev_resources:write' scope on PAT or OAuth. Empirically verified via PAT UI absence + OAuth invalid_scope rejection in code-connect-automation feature closure (2026-05-10).
code_connect_write_access.impact_on_this_feature: NONE. /design-system showcase route works without Code Connect publish. Drift detection works without publish. The 17+13 component mappings can land as .figma.tsx files in code without being publishable until the scope unblocks (tracked as backlog item 'Re-activate Code Connect publish when Figma seat/plan unblocks').

design_build_disposition.reason: This feature has no pre-Phase-4 frames to create. The showcase route's NEW components (ComponentCard, TokenSwatch, VariantGrid, StatusBadge, DriftReportCard, DarkModeMatrix) are meta-components that DISPLAY other components — they don't themselves need Figma representations. The new tokens (motion/elevation/z-index) are additive VARIABLES in the existing collection — they get added in Phase 4 T1 atomically with their CSS + TS mirrors. The 13+ unmapped components (control-room/persona/case-study) get Figma frames + .figma.tsx mappings task-by-task in Phase 4 T10-T14.

what_phase_4_will_push_to_figma.scopes_per_token: Per ux-spec.md §4 — appropriate scope per token type (e.g., GAP for spacing-like, ALL_FILLS for color-derived shadows)

what_phase_4_will_push_to_figma.note: Source-frame design + COMPONENT conversion + .figma.tsx mapping in one atomic task per family

design_build_disposition.figma_node_ids_capture_strategy: Each Phase 4 task that creates a Figma frame writes the resulting node_id back to state.json::figma_node_ids in the same commit. /design pre-merge-review (Phase 6) will validate parity between state.json::figma_node_ids and the .figma.tsx files at PR-time.
